# ollim-bot Documentation

> ADHD-friendly Discord bot with proactive reminders, powered by Claude.

## Getting Started
- [ollim-bot overview](getting-started/overview.mdx): ADHD-friendly Discord bot with proactive reminders, powered by Claude.
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.mdx): Get ollim-bot running in under 5 minutes.
- [Setup guide](getting-started/setup.mdx): Full setup: Discord bot, Google OAuth, environment, and first run.
- [How ollim-bot works](getting-started/how-it-works.mdx): The agent loop, session persistence, fork model, and context flow.
- [Design philosophy](getting-started/design-philosophy.mdx): Why ollim-bot is built the way it is.

## Using the Bot
- [Conversations](core-usage/conversations.mdx): DM interface, message flow, and context management.
- [Slash commands](core-usage/slash-commands.mdx): All Discord slash commands available in ollim-bot.
- [Forks](core-usage/forks.mdx): Interactive forks, background forks, and exit strategies.
- [Embeds & buttons](core-usage/embeds-and-buttons.mdx): Agent-controlled embeds, button actions, and inquiry flow.
- [Permissions](core-usage/permissions.mdx): Permission modes, approval flow, and session-allowed tools.

## Scheduling
- [Scheduling overview](scheduling/overview.mdx): Proactive scheduling with routines and reminders.
- [Routines](scheduling/routines.mdx): Recurring cron-based schedules with YAML frontmatter.
- [Reminders](scheduling/reminders.mdx): One-shot and chainable reminders.
- [Background forks](scheduling/background-forks.mdx): Isolated mode, model overrides, tool restrictions, and update modes.
- [Ping budget](scheduling/ping-budget.mdx): Refill-on-read bucket for background fork notifications.
- [Real-world examples](scheduling/examples.mdx): Annotated scheduling examples from an actual data directory.

## Integrations
- [Google integration](integrations/google-overview.mdx): OAuth setup, shared auth, and available Google services.
- [Google Tasks](integrations/google-tasks.mdx): Task management, CLI commands, and embed button actions.
- [Google Calendar](integrations/google-calendar.mdx): Event management, CLI commands, and embed button actions.
- [Gmail](integrations/google-gmail.mdx): Read-only email access via the gmail-reader subagent.
- [Webhooks](integrations/webhooks.mdx): External triggers with spec files, schema validation, and Haiku screening.

## Extending
- [Extend ollim-bot](extending/overview.mdx): When to use routines, reminders, webhooks, MCP tools, or subagents.
- [MCP tools](extending/mcp-tools.mdx): All MCP tools: discord_embed, ping_user, follow_up_chain, save_context, report_updates, enter_fork, exit_fork.
- [Subagents](extending/subagents.mdx): gmail-reader, history-reviewer, and responsiveness-reviewer subagents.
- [System prompt](extending/system-prompt.mdx): How the system prompt is structured and what gets injected.
- [Adding new integrations](extending/adding-integrations.mdx): How to add Google services, MCP tools, CLI commands, and webhook specs.

## Self-Hosting
- [Self-hosting guide](self-hosting/guide.mdx): Running your own instance: fork, configure, deploy.
- [Discord bot setup](self-hosting/discord-bot-setup.mdx): Create a Discord application, bot token, and enable required intents.
- [Google OAuth setup](self-hosting/google-oauth-setup.mdx): Google Cloud Console, credentials.json, and first auth flow.

## Configuration
- [Configuration reference](configuration/reference.mdx): All environment variables, .env file, and data directory structure.
- [Data directory](configuration/data-directory.mdx): Layout of ~/.ollim-bot/: routines, reminders, webhooks, sessions, and more.
- [File formats](configuration/file-formats.mdx): YAML frontmatter specs and JSONL formats for all data files.

## Architecture
- [Architecture overview](architecture/overview.mdx): Module map, dependency diagram, and data flow.
- [Session management](architecture/session-management.mdx): Persistent sessions, session history, compaction, and /clear lifecycle.
- [Context flow](architecture/context-flow.mdx): How context flows between main session, forks, background forks, and pending updates.
- [Streaming & Discord](architecture/streaming.mdx): How agent responses stream to Discord with throttled edits and overflow handling.

## Development
- [Development guide](development/guide.mdx): Dev setup, running locally, project structure, and code conventions.
- [Testing](development/testing.mdx): Test philosophy, running tests, and no-mocks policy.
- [CLI reference](development/cli-reference.mdx): ollim-bot subcommands: bot, routine, reminder, tasks, cal, gmail.
- [Troubleshooting](development/troubleshooting.mdx): Common issues, debugging, log locations, and session recovery.

## Changelog
- [Changelog](changelog.mdx): Version history and updates.
